title: Docker incompatibility: events API uses Action="died", not Action="die"
body: This is essentially the same issue as #10168 (fixed in 3.2.0), but for the `Action` field of the event. I suggest to change it for the legacy API as well.

comments.body: also podman sets `containerExitCode`, but docker sets `exitCode`.
Please open a PR to change.  4.0 is your time to fix these. Although if they are compat then they can be fixed at any time.
